treaty.title: China-Netherlands Tax Treaty Article 10
notes: Generated by the first source-document import stub.
Uses structured source segments as a placeholder for later parser output.

articles.summary: Article 10 governs the taxation of dividends paid by a company resident in one State to a resident of the other State, allowing taxation in both States with specified withholding tax rate limits when the recipient is the beneficial owner.

paragraphs.source_excerpt: Dividends paid by a company which is a resident of one of the States to a resident of the other State may be taxed in that other State.

source_segments.text: Dividends paid by a company which is a resident of one of the States to a resident of the other State may be taxed in that other State.

conditions: This paragraph allocates taxing rights between the treaty jurisdictions.
This paragraph does not by itself state a reduced withholding cap.
rules.review_reason: General rule establishing taxation rights in the recipient's State.

paragraphs.source_excerpt: However, such dividends may also be taxed in the State of which the company paying the dividends is a resident, and according to the laws of that State, but if the recipient is the beneficial owner of the dividends the tax so charged shall not exceed: (a) 5 per cent of the gross amount of the dividends if the beneficial owner is a company which holds directly at least 25 per cent of the capital of the company paying the dividends; (b) 10 per cent of the gross amount of the dividends in all other cases.

source_segments.text: However, such dividends may also be taxed in the State of which the company paying the dividends is a resident, and according to the laws of that State, but if the recipient is the beneficial owner of the dividends the tax so charged shall not exceed: (a) 5 per cent of the gross amount of the dividends if the beneficial owner is a company which holds directly at least 25 per cent of the capital of the company paying the dividends; (b) 10 per cent of the gross amount of the dividends in all other cases.

conditions: If the beneficial owner is a company which holds directly at least 25 per cent of the capital of the company paying the dividends.
rules.review_reason: Specific rate condition based on shareholding threshold.
